apps.name: CleanCut
apps.shortDescription: Mute profanity, generate subtitles, and convert videos privately on your Mac.
apps.longDescription: CleanCut cleans up videos on-device. It can mute profanity, create SRT or embedded subtitles, and convert difficult video files into a broadly compatible MP4 without uploading source media.
apps.license: One activated computer; customers can deactivate before moving Macs.
notes: CleanCut currently owns the home page until more apps are ready.
Do not reuse CleanCut's Polar IDs, bundle ID, release repo, or app storage keys for another app.

apps.name: PolishKey
apps.shortDescription: Rewrite selected text with a private local AI model from a desktop hotkey.
apps.longDescription: PolishKey rewrites selected text in place using a bundled local model provider. It is built for support replies, emails, notes, and quick messages without sending drafts to cloud AI.
apps.license: One activated computer; customers can deactivate before moving machines.
notes: Do not reuse CleanCut's Polar IDs, bundle ID, release repo, checkout URL, license benefit, app-storage keys, or download assets.
Flip Apple Silicon Mac to available only after the Polar checkout and notarized PolishKey.dmg are live.
